main.description: Approve or deny a pending device-pairing attempt, identified by the `userCode` the device displayed. Called from the verification UI by a signed-in user. Approving requires the provider `session` to grant to the device.

session.description: Provider session to grant to the device; required when `decision` is `approve`.

errors.name: InvalidRequest
errors.description: Missing `userCode`, an invalid `decision`, or `approve` without a `session`.

errors.name: Conflict
errors.description: The pairing attempt could not be approved in its current state.
